name: Bannerlord's Armor
setBonus: <u>Bannerlord</u>: Increase your Anomaly Power by 35%. Also, Tremor explosions that damage an enemy reduce the Cooldown of next Impale by 15%. Bonus stacks up to 60%.

name: Concussioner's Boots
setBonus: <u>Concussioner</u>: Taking damage generates Melee energy. Using your Melee skill releases the energy, dealing 80% of taken damage within a 10 meter radius. The released damage scales with your Armor. Generated energy depletes gradually every 2 seconds.
